user_query: What work events did we cancel? Check the previous itinerary versions
full_query: READ(/Root/Itinerary_Version[4]/Day[5]/*[atom(content =~ "work") OR atom(content =~ "email") OR atom(content =~ "client check-in") OR atom(content =~ "networking")])
xpath_query: /Root/Itinerary_Version[4]/Day[5]/*[atom(content =~ "work") OR atom(content =~ "email") OR atom(content =~ "client check-in") OR atom(content =~ "networking")]

selected_nodes.name: Email Catch-up Block
selected_nodes.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 4 > Day 5 > Email Catch-up Block
selected_nodes.reasoning: Email Catch-up Block is explicitly a work-related time block (respond to work emails) and is listed in the Version Change Context as deleted from the previous itinerary version.

selected_nodes.name: Client Check-in Call
selected_nodes.description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 4 > Day 5 > Client Check-in Call
selected_nodes.reasoning: Client Check-in Call is a remote work meeting (client call) and is listed in the Version Change Context as deleted from the previous itinerary version.

selected_nodes.name: Networking Drinks
selected_nodes.description: Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Networking Drinks is a work-adjacent professional social event (networking) and is listed in the Version Change Context as deleted from the previous itinerary version.
